title: ANC - Switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
scenario: Transparency Mode correctly switches OFF and is greyed out when toggling to ANC Mode with previously selected ANC value
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Tap on Transparency Mode to enable it.
5. If available, tap on Environment or Speech sub-settings under Transparency Mode and select a value.
7. Tap on ANC to switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode.
8. Observe the ANC toggle state and value.
9. Observe the Transparency Mode toggle state and sub-settings.
expected: ANC is ON with the previously selected ANC value (e.g., High, Low, Adaptive). Transparency Mode is switched OFF and its Environment/Speech sub-settings are greyed out/disabled.
